title: Other Crushed and Broken Stone Mining and Quarrying

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 212319 ($699,422,671) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 212319 ($2,923,794,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).
